selections.name: Sheer Will
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 104 and class of 106. Gets a +3 wet track bonus for previous muddy track proficiency.

selections.name: Meg's Foxy Grey
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 101 speed and 106 class. Proven on wet tracks and draws a favorable outside post.

selections.name: Hey Cookie
selections.reason: Solid 102 speed figure. Inside draw on a muddy track could be tricky, but early speed keeps her in the mix.

selections.name: Majestic Return
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 100 rating. Form cycle suggests she can grab a piece of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Princess Ny
danger_horse.reason: Owns a 101 class rating and could capitalize if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Emirates Road
selections.reason: Massive class advantage with a 112 rating. Speed figure of 108 dominates this field. Standout Golden Gap overlay.

selections.name: Unlimitedpotential
selections.reason: Matches the top pick's 108 speed figure and boasts a 109 class rating. Main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Shadow Dragon
selections.reason: Class rating of 108 and speed of 106. Should get a good stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Mr. Papagiorgio
selections.reason: Consistent 106 speed and 107 class. Reliable underneath in exotic wagers.

danger_horse.name: Frizzante
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is favorable given the track bias notes. Can outrun his odds.

exotic_strategy.strategy: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Win Bet #6, Exacta 6 / 1,4, Trifecta 6 / 1,4 / 1,3,4,7

selections.name: Will Not Be Swayed
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 108 in the field. Should relish the muddy conditions and distance.

selections.name: Always Angels
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the race at 110. Drops in class and fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Geez Eloise
selections.reason: Solid 104 speed and class. Inside draw is the only concern, but possesses enough tactical speed.

selections.name: Rachel's Rock
selections.reason: Evenly matched with the middle tier. 103 speed and class makes her a logical exotic inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Khali Magic
danger_horse.reason: Veteran mare with back class. Can pop a big figure on an off track.

selections.name: Curlin's Magic
selections.reason: Strong 100 speed and 99 class. Upgraded for wet track pedigree and favorable outside flow.

selections.name: Whistler's Style
selections.reason: Class rating of 100 tops the field. Should be closing late into the muddy fractions.

selections.name: Foxy Cara
selections.reason: Ties for top speed at 100. Tactical presser who should get a good trip.

selections.name: Floge
selections.reason: Consistent 97 speed. Dead rail is a concern, but class is competitive enough for a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Farm House
danger_horse.reason: Capable of running a 97 speed figure. Needs a clean trip from the inside.

selections.name: Moment's Notice
selections.reason: Race moved off the turf. Massive class rating of 110 makes him a standout against this depleted field.

selections.name: Three Percent
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed figure and 106 class. Proven dirt ability gives him a huge edge here.

selections.name: Shellac
selections.reason: Solid 102 speed and 101 class. Should handle the surface switch well.

selections.name: Calling Card
selections.reason: Class rating of 103. Outside draw is highly favorable on this track bias.

danger_horse.name: Ready Set Twirl
danger_horse.reason: Raw speed of 111 is dangerous, though class is slightly lower. Threat if loose on the lead.

selections.name: Blame The Banker
selections.reason: Off-the-turf sprint. 104 speed figure is top of the remaining runners. Strong dirt pedigree.

selections.name: Big Air
selections.reason: 103 speed and 101 class. Outside draw is perfect for the off-track bias.

selections.name: Circuit Court
selections.reason: Consistent 101 speed. Should get a clean outside stalking trip.

selections.name: Midnite Ginny
selections.reason: Class rating of 103 makes her a major player despite the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Saucy Six
danger_horse.reason: Could pick up the pieces if the pace is too hot up front.

selections.name: Bourbon Day
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 111. Outside draw is a massive advantage on this track. Ready to fire.

selections.name: Toxic Gray
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field at 113. Will be flying late and is the main danger.

selections.name: Ignite The Light
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed and 109 class. Tactical speed puts him in a prime position.

selections.name: Donegal Surges
selections.reason: 108 speed figure. Inside post is a negative, but class keeps him in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Raise The Bar

selections.name: Quiet Street

selections.name: Piper's Gift
selections.reason: Ties for top class at 116. Speed of 107 makes her the clear second choice.

selections.name: Fitz Right
selections.reason: Class rating of 109 and speed of 104. Solid turf pedigree for yielding ground.

selections.name: Imperatrice
selections.reason: High class rating of 113. Will appreciate the yielding turf and outside draw.

danger_horse.name: Full Of Tact
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 108 makes her a sneaky longshot for the bottom of the trifecta.

selections.name: Chris's Song

selections.name: Alzero
selections.reason: Class rating of 103. Should handle the muddy dirt track well.

selections.name: Ryan's Shadow
selections.reason: 95 speed figure puts him in the mix for the exotics in a depleted field.
